rationale: No conflict. The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Educ. Code §37.1082, which governs school district multihazard emergency operations plan noncompliance and conservator/board of managers appointments.
quote: Sec. 37.1082. MULTIHAZARD EMERGENCY OPERATIONS PLAN NONCOMPLIANCE; APPOINTMENT OF CONSERVATOR OR BOARD OF MANAGERS.
_note: The rule text concerns school safety plan compliance; it has no operative connection to property tax homestead exemption amounts.
